Configurations and data structures for board power, button management, and display settings.


## Files
- **[board.h](board.h.md)**: Defines data structures and configurations for button and power management on the board.
- **[board_bb2.h](board_bb2.h.md)**: Configuration for board power and button settings using STM32F2xx GPIO in the Pebble firmware.
- **[board_definitions.h](board_definitions.h.md)**: Defines board-specific configurations for different Pebble hardware versions.
- **[board_ev2_4.h](board_ev2_4.h.md)**: Configuration for power and button settings on the EV2.4 board using STM32F2xx GPIO.
- **[board_v1_5.h](board_v1_5.h.md)**: Configuration for board version 1.5, including power and button settings.
- **[board_v2_0.h](board_v2_0.h.md)**: Configuration for power and button settings on the STM32F2xx platform.
- **[display.h](display.h.md)**: Defines display dimensions and shape for the Pebble firmware.
